requirement_topic.en: System and Cell Safety Certification — IEC 62619 / SASO Technical Regulation
requirement_topic.zh: 系统与电芯安全认证——IEC 62619 / SASO技术法规
requirement_topic.zht: 系統與電芯安全認證——IEC 62619 / SASO技術法規

summary.en: Saudi Arabia's Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO) has issued a technical regulation requiring stationary battery energy storage systems to meet IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) at the cell and module level. SASO references IEC 62619 as the primary safety standard for lithium cells used in industrial and stationary storage applications. Products subject to SASO technical regulations must obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) via the SABER platform before they can be legally placed on the Saudi market.
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯标准、计量和质量组织（SASO）已颁布技术法规，要求固定式电池储能系统在电芯和模组层面符合IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）。SASO将IEC 62619列为工业及固定储能应用锂电芯的主要安全标准。受SASO技术法规约束的产品在进入沙特市场前，须通过SABER平台取得产品合格证书（PCoC）。
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯標準、計量和質量組織（SASO）已頒布技術法規，要求固定式電池儲能系統在電芯和模組層面符合IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）。SASO將IEC 62619列為工業及固定儲能應用鋰電芯的主要安全標準。受SASO技術法規約束的產品在進入沙特市場前，須通過SABER平台取得產品合格證書（PCoC）。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems — Part 2-1: Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification
SASO SABER platform — Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) requirement for regulated products

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for stationary lithium-ion BESS cells is GB 36276-2023 (Safety Requirements for Lithium-Ion Battery for Electrical Energy Storage, 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池). The overall system is covered by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems). GB 36276 and IEC 62619 share some test methodology overlap (e.g. overcharge, short-circuit, thermal abuse), but they are not harmonised: GB 36276 is assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese labs, whereas SASO requires IEC 62619 compliance assessed by a SASO-approved conformity assessment body for the SABER PCoC.
summary.zh: 中国固定式储能锂电池的主要强制性标准为GB 36276-2023（电化学储能电站用锂离子电池安全要求）。系统整体由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖。GB 36276与IEC 62619在部分测试方法上有重叠（如过充、短路、热滥用），但两者未实现协调：GB 36276由中国CNAS认可实验室评定，而SASO要求通过SASO认可的合格评定机构对IEC 62619合规性进行评估，以取得SABER PCoC。
summary.zht: 中國固定式儲能鋰電池的主要強制性標準為GB 36276-2023（電化學儲能電站用鋰離子電池安全要求）。系統整體由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋。GB 36276與IEC 62619在部分測試方法上有重疊（如過充、短路、熱濫用），但兩者未實現協調：GB 36276由中國CNAS認可實驗室評定，而SASO要求通過SASO認可的合格評定機構對IEC 62619合規性進行評估，以取得SABER PCoC。

standards_or_laws: GB 36276-2023 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池安全要求 (Safety Requirements for Lithium-Ion Battery for Electrical Energy Storage)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems)

gap.en: Critical gap: Chinese GB 36276 certification is not accepted by SASO as equivalent to IEC 62619 compliance. BESS cells and modules exported from China to Saudi Arabia must be tested to IEC 62619 by a SASO-approved conformity assessment body and a PCoC obtained through the SABER platform. While there is partial test methodology overlap between GB 36276 and IEC 62619, no mutual recognition agreement between SASO and Chinese certification bodies (CQC/CNCA) has been confirmed for this scope. Additionally, IEC 62933 system-level requirements may apply to the overall ESS package depending on the project specification and Saudi authority having jurisdiction.
gap.zh: 关键差距：中国GB 36276认证不被SASO接受为IEC 62619合规的等效依据。从中国出口至沙特的BESS电芯和模组，须由SASO认可的合格评定机构依据IEC 62619进行检测，并通过SABER平台取得PCoC。尽管GB 36276与IEC 62619在测试方法上有部分重叠，但目前尚未确认SASO与中国认证机构（CQC/CNCA）之间在此范围内存在互认协议。此外，根据项目规格及沙特主管机构要求，IEC 62933系统级要求也可能适用于整体ESS方案。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：中國GB 36276認證不被SASO接受為IEC 62619合規的等效依據。從中國出口至沙特的BESS電芯和模組，須由SASO認可的合格評定機構依據IEC 62619進行檢測，並通過SABER平台取得PCoC。儘管GB 36276與IEC 62619在測試方法上有部分重疊，但目前尚未確認SASO與中國認證機構（CQC/CNCA）之間在此範圍內存在互認協議。此外，根據項目規格及沙特主管機構要求，IEC 62933系統級要求也可能適用於整體ESS方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SASO technical regulation requires IEC 62619 compliance and SABER PCoC for regulated battery products entering the Saudi market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 36276-2023 is a mandatory national standard (强制性国家标准) enforced by SAMR/SAC for stationary BESS cells sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A BESS product holding only Chinese GB 36276 certification cannot be legally placed on the Saudi market without first obtaining IEC 62619 compliance assessment and a SABER PCoC from a SASO-approved conformity assessment body. Exporters should verify the current SASO technical regulation number and product classification on the SABER platform before committing to a compliance programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB 36276认证的BESS产品，在未通过SASO认可的合格评定机构取得IEC 62619合规评估及SABER PCoC的情况下，不得在沙特市场合法销售。出口商在启动合规计划前，应在SABER平台核实当前适用的SASO技术法规编号及产品分类。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB 36276認證的BESS產品，在未通過SASO認可的合格評定機構取得IEC 62619合規評估及SABER PCoC的情況下，不得在沙特市場合法銷售。出口商在啟動合規計畫前，應在SABER平台核實當前適用的SASO技術法規編號及產品分類。

requirement_topic.en: Battery Management System (BMS) Safety — IEC 62619 BMS Functional Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 电池管理系统（BMS）安全——IEC 62619 BMS功能要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電池管理系統（BMS）安全——IEC 62619 BMS功能要求

summary.en: IEC 62619, as referenced by SASO, includes functional safety requirements for the Battery Management System (BMS) integral to the battery module or system. The BMS must demonstrate overvoltage, undervoltage, overcurrent, and overtemperature protection, and these functions are assessed as part of the IEC 62619 compliance evaluation. BMS hardware and software design documentation is required for conformity assessment.
summary.zh: SASO引用的IEC 62619包含对电池模组或系统一体化BMS的功能安全要求。BMS须证明过压、欠压、过流及过温保护功能，这些功能作为IEC 62619合规评估的组成部分进行评定。合格评定需提交BMS硬件与软件设计文件。
summary.zht: SASO引用的IEC 62619包含對電池模組或系統一體化BMS的功能安全要求。BMS須證明過壓、欠壓、過流及過溫保護功能，這些功能作為IEC 62619合規評估的組成部分進行評定。合格評定需提交BMS硬件與軟件設計文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (BMS functional safety provisions)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems — General Specification (system-level BMS integration requirements)

summary.en: GB/T 34131-2023 (Technical Specification for Battery Management Systems in Electrochemical Energy Storage Stations) specifies BMS requirements for stationary BESS in China. GB 36276-2023 also references BMS protection requirements at the module level. These Chinese BMS standards are not recognised as equivalent to IEC 62619 BMS evaluation for SASER SABER PCoC purposes.
summary.zh: GB/T 34131-2023（电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范）规定了中国固定储能BMS要求。GB 36276-2023在模组层面亦引用了BMS保护要求。上述中国BMS标准不被认可为SABER PCoC合规目的下的IEC 62619 BMS评估等效依据。
summary.zht: GB/T 34131-2023（電化學儲能電站用鋰離子電池管理系統技術規範）規定了中國固定儲能BMS要求。GB 36276-2023在模組層面亦引用了BMS保護要求。上述中國BMS標準不被認可為SABER PCoC合規目的下的IEC 62619 BMS評估等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2023 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (BMS Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage Stations)
GB 36276-2023 — BMS protection requirements referenced at module level

gap.en: Gap: BMS validation under GB/T 34131 does not substitute for IEC 62619 BMS evaluation required by SASO. Chinese BESS manufacturers must provide BMS design documentation and IEC 62619 compliance evidence to the SASO-approved conformity assessment body. Post-certification BMS firmware changes may require re-evaluation and an updated PCoC on the SABER platform.
gap.zh: 差距：依据GB/T 34131进行的BMS验证不能替代SASO要求的IEC 62619 BMS评估。中国BESS制造商须向SASO认可的合格评定机构提交BMS设计文件及IEC 62619合规证明。认证后的BMS固件变更可能需要重新评估并在SABER平台更新PCoC。
gap.zht: 差距：依據GB/T 34131進行的BMS驗證不能替代SASO要求的IEC 62619 BMS評估。中國BESS製造商須向SASO認可的合格評定機構提交BMS設計文件及IEC 62619合規證明。認證後的BMS固件變更可能需要重新評估並在SABER平台更新PCoC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BMS compliance is integral to IEC 62619 assessment required for SABER PCoC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in practice — GB/T 34131 is recommended standard but BMS compliance with GB 36276 is mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BMS validation performed under Chinese GB/T 34131 does not satisfy IEC 62619 BMS evaluation requirements for Saudi SABER PCoC purposes. Manufacturers should plan for IEC 62619 BMS documentation review and establish a change-control procedure for post-certification firmware updates.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据中国GB/T 34131进行的BMS验证不满足沙特SABER PCoC合规所需的IEC 62619 BMS评估要求。制造商应将IEC 62619 BMS文件审查纳入合规规划，并建立认证后固件更新的变更控制程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據中國GB/T 34131進行的BMS驗證不滿足沙特SABER PCoC合規所需的IEC 62619 BMS評估要求。製造商應將IEC 62619 BMS文件審查納入合規規劃，並建立認證後固件更新的變更控制程序。
